name: Windwitch - Freeze Bell
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＷＷ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ウィンド・ウィッチ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－フリーズ・ベル
desc: If all monsters you control are "Windwitch" monsters (min. 1): You can Special Summon this card from your hand. You can only use this effect of "Windwitch - Freeze Bell" once per turn. Once per turn, during your Main Phase: You can increase this card's Level by 1. A WIND Synchro Monster that was Summoned using this card as Synchro Material cannot be destroyed by battle.
mnst_eff: If all monsters you control are "Windwitch" monsters (min. 1): You can Special Summon this card from your hand. You can only use this effect of "Windwitch - Freeze Bell" once per turn. Once per turn, during your Main Phase: You can increase this card's Level by 1. A WIND Synchro Monster that was Summoned using this card as Synchro Material cannot be destroyed by battle.
eff: If all monsters you control are "Windwitch" monsters (min. 1): You can Special Summon this card from your hand. You can only use this effect of "Windwitch - Freeze Bell" once per turn. Once per turn, during your Main Phase: You can increase this card's Level by 1. A WIND Synchro Monster that was Summoned using this card as Synchro Material cannot be destroyed by battle.

action: Applies effect when used as Synchro Material
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
